deploy.startCommand: php artisan config:clear && php artisan route:clear && php artisan view:clear && php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=$PORT
deploy.preDeployCommand: php artisan config:clear && php artisan route:clear && php artisan view:clear && php artisan migrate --force && php artisan db:seed --force && php artisan storage:link --force
